task_completion.description: Verify that JStock is open and 'My Portfolio' is the active portfolio.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JStock application window is visible, and 'My Portfolio' is selected in the portfolio dropdown menu or displayed in the active tab/window title.

task_completion.description: Verify the first deposit entry has the correct amount and date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the deposit or cash management table, there is a row showing an amount of 30,000 (or 30,000.00) and a date corresponding to Jan 10, 2024.

task_completion.description: Verify the first deposit entry has the correct comment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the same row as the $30,000 deposit, the comment or note field contains the text 'Initial brokerage funding'.

task_completion.description: Verify the second deposit entry has the correct amount and date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the deposit or cash management table, there is a second row showing an amount of 25,000 (or 25,000.00) and a date corresponding to Mar 01, 2024.

task_completion.description: Verify the second deposit entry has the correct comment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the same row as the $25,000 deposit, the comment or note field contains the text 'Additional capital contribution'.

task_completion.description: Verify the total deposit amount reflects both entries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A total deposit or cash balance of 55,000 (or 55,000.00) is visible at the bottom of the deposit table or in the portfolio summary.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the JStock graphical user interface to enter the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the JStock application interface (menus, dialog boxes, tables) being interacted with, rather than a text editor or spreadsheet program.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to directly modify the underlying CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing commands like 'echo', 'nano', 'vim', or 'cat' being used to edit 'depositsummary.csv' directly.

integrity.description: Verify the data was entered into the correct input fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text for the deposits and comments should appear inside the standard JStock input fields or table cells, not just pasted as a single block of text somewhere on the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The active portfolio must be 'My Portfolio'. Deposit 1 must be for $30,000.00 on Jan 10, 2024, with the comment 'Initial brokerage funding'. Deposit 2 must be for $25,000.00 on Mar 01, 2024, with the comment 'Additional capital contribution'. The total deposit amount should be exactly $55,000.00.
